blocked_task.title: Add daemon blocked-task prompt-budget fixture coverage
blocked_task.target_summary: Add daemon blocked-task prompt-budget fixture coverage proving repeated llm_router exits summarize the target, compact errors, and next daemon-repair hint without retrying blocked domain work.
blocked_task.blocked_domain_work: broad live crawl, authenticated DevHub automation, or another domain implementation retry

llm_router_exits.error_summary: llm_router exited after prompt budget while preparing a broad domain retry.
llm_router exited again before producing a syntax-valid fixture repair.

daemon_prompt.target_summary: checkbox-63: add deterministic fixture coverage for blocked-task prompt-budget handling after repeated llm_router exits.

compact_errors.summary: llm_router exited repeatedly while attempting broad domain work; keep follow-up output limited to fixture and test repair.
Previous generated Python was invalid at `assert len(compact_errors) None`; replace it with explicit comparison syntax.

daemon_prompt.next_daemon_repair_hint: Return the smallest syntax-valid fixture/test replacement under ppd/tests that asserts target_summary, compact_errors, and retry_blocked_domain_work is false.

expected_assertions: two repeated llm_router prompt-budget exits are represented
the daemon prompt keeps a concise target summary for checkbox-63
errors are compacted into bounded summaries with counts
the next daemon-repair hint points to fixture/test repair
blocked domain work is not retried after repeated router exits
